title: Groups covered by finitely many nilpotent subgroups
journal: Bulletin of the Australian Mathematical Society
abstract: LetGbe a finitely generated soluble group. Lennox and Wiegold have proved thatGhas a finite covering by nilpotent subgroups if and only if any infinite set of elements ofGcontains a pair {x, y} such that (x, y) is nilpotent. The main theorem of this paper is an improvement of the previous result: we show thatGhas a finite covering by nilpotent subgroups if and only if any infinite set of elements ofGcontains a pair {x, y} such that [x,ny] = 1 for some integern= n(x, y) ≥ 0.
